ideation: This sequence will show the robot basking in the sun's warmth.  It starts with arms at the sides, then raises them in a slow, embracing motion, and finally settles into a relaxed pose. The movement should be slow and deliberate, conveying a sense of calm enjoyment.  The use of both arms creates a symmetrical and balanced animation. Frame 1 will show a neutral position, Frame 2 will show arms rising, Frame 3 will show arms reaching a peak, and Frame 4 will show arms slowly lowering.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, waiting for the sun
arms slowly lift, embracing the warmth
arms reach up fully, basking in the light
arms gently lower, content and serene
